location: Purchased for 1,000 Runes from the Nomadic Merchant stationed beside the Liurnia Lake Shore Site of Grace at the southern edge of Liurnia's great lake.
tactics: Fast travel straight to Liurnia Lake Shore grace — the merchant sits right next to it, no exploration needed.
Bring enough runes; if short, nearby lake enemies and crafting materials can offset the cost.
lore: A standard medium metal shield whose reliable ability to block physical damage while guarding made it a battlefield staple.

builds.name: Budget Strength tank
builds.why: 100% physical negation for cheap runes, good baseline shield until something with elemental negation is found.
